sections.title: The store
sections.intro: Welcome to Northwind Goods — let me show you around.

stops.title: Welcome
stops.narration: This is Northwind Goods — small-batch homeware, made by hand. Hit this button any time to browse the whole collection.

stops.title: Featured products
stops.narration: These are the pieces everyone is loving right now. The pour-over set and the oak board restock every week.

stops.title: Our story
stops.narration: Everything here comes from eleven independent Pacific Northwest workshops — fair rates, no rushed seasons.

stops.title: Reviews
stops.narration: Two thousand three hundred reviews, four point nine average. The throw blanket reviews are basically love letters.

stops.title: Shipping & returns
stops.narration: Orders ship in forty-eight hours, returns are free for sixty days, and every piece carries a lifetime repair promise.
